sections.heading: Shift keys and capitals
sections.body:
Practice these words and sentences:

Words: The Quick Brown Fox JavaScript Python Hello World GitHub Server

The Quick Brown Fox Jumps Over The Lazy Dog.
Hello World From JavaScript!
GitHub Is The Best Server For Code.

sections.heading: Practice Tips
sections.body:
1. Keep your eyes on the screen
2. Use proper finger placement
3. Start slow, accuracy first
4. Speed will come with practice

jargon.definition: Words Per Minute - typing speed measure

summary: Complete this lesson to improve your Shift keys and capitals skills.
